Video.summary: It's a high-stakes "Wednesday evening pickleball party" on Day 6 of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) as Pune United takes on the Chennai Super Champs at the CCI Brabourne Stadium. With both teams currently sitting low on the points table (fifth and sixth), this game is a crucial must-win for both, offering a chance for one team to gain much-needed inspiration and move up the standings.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Chennai - Day 6 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Chennai - Day 6 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Chennai - Day 6 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Chennai - Day 6 Tie 1

Video.summary: Straight from The Orchard at Jigsaw Health, Tuesday Night Pickleball brings you a high-octane women’s doubles matchup featuring four elite pros. Anna Bright and Jessie Irvine team up with firepower and finesse to take on the seasoned duo of Lucy Kovalova and Catherine Parenteau.From smart stacking and sharp cross-court dinks to quick hands battles and momentum swings, this match is packed with elite-level tactics and crowd-thrilling rallies. It’s classic TNP: fun, fiery, and full of flair.
Video.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball – August 2, 2022 – Women’s Doubles – Bright & Irvine vs Kovalova & Parentea

Image.alt: Tuesday Night Pickleball – August 2, 2022 – Women’s Doubles – Bright & Irvine vs Kovalova & Parentea
Tuesday Night Pickleball – August 2, 2022 – Women’s Doubles – Bright & Irvine vs Kovalova & Parentea
Tuesday Night Pickleball – August 2, 2022 – Women’s Doubles – Bright & Irvine vs Kovalova & Parentea

Video.summary: Beth Bellamy & Yates Johnson compete with Megan Fudge & Paul Olin in a Bronze medal match
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Bronze Medal

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Bronze Medal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Bronze Medal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Bronze Medal

Video.summary: Get ready for a one-of-a-kind pickleball experience at the Minto U.S. Open Pickleball Championships, powered by Margaritaville. This video features highlights from the Pro Mixed Doubles match between Valdes/Gabrielsen and Barr/Lane. Watch Brandon Lane's commanding presence on the court, as he strategically positions himself at the kitchen line to capture any balls he can. The tournament is held at a beautiful facility in Naples, Florida, which is unlike any other in the world, and draws tens of thousands of people.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles - Valdes/Gabrielsen vs. Barr/Lane

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles - Valdes/Gabrielsen vs. Barr/Lane
US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles - Valdes/Gabrielsen vs. Barr/Lane
US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles - Valdes/Gabrielsen vs. Barr/Lane

Video.summary: Watch a Mixed Pro Age pickleball match between the team of Shelby Bates and a partner against the team of Rob Contratto and Renee Chang. This video highlights a matchup of athletes with diverse athletic backgrounds. The caption file reveals that Rob Contratto was a professional ice hockey player and Renee Chang played rugby and soccer in college. Catch all the dinks, volleys, and strategic plays as these two teams battle it out.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Bates/Morariu vs. Contratto/Chang

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Bates/Morariu vs. Contratto/Chang
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Bates/Morariu vs. Contratto/Chang
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Bates/Morariu vs. Contratto/Chang

Video.summary: Watch a thrilling Mixed Pro Doubles pickleball match between the top-seeded team of Megan Fudge and Jack Munro against Peichuan Kao and Ryler DeHeart. Megan Fudge is a highly-ranked professional player who previously played tennis at the University of Illinois, where she met her husband and partner, Ryler DeHeart. DeHeart is a former professional tennis player who is left-handed. Their opponents are Peichuan Kao, a professional pickleball player who won gold at the APP Fort Lauderdale Open, and Jack Munro, a young pro who was the youngest to become a professional at age 12.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Kao/DeHeart vs. Fudge/Munro

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Kao/DeHeart vs. Fudge/Munro
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Kao/DeHeart vs. Fudge/Munro
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Kao/DeHeart vs. Fudge/Munro

Video.summary: March 28, 2023 - it's the Peoria Pythons and the Gilbert Gladiators in a battle for the best - live at The Orchard!
Video.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball - March 28, 2023 - AZ PBL

Video.summary: Lalani Bates and Susannah Barr take on Amanda Studnicki and Cass Hoag in this Women's Pro Doubles Quarterfinal.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Pro Doubles - Quarterfinal

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Pro Doubles - Quarterfinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Pro Doubles - Quarterfinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Pro Doubles - Quarterfinal

Video.summary: Live from the NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025, this pivotal collegiate team match features Kennesaw State (KSU) facing off against Virginia Tech. The action kicks off with a mixed doubles showdown chosen by coin-toss winner Virginia Tech.Watch as Virginia Tech's Cody Miller and Heather Murphy bring their A-game against KSU's Yuri Yadi and Sophia Fiona. The match also features men's doubles with Kellen Funk and Cody Miller representing the Hokies, while Parth Modi and his partner fight to keep KSU's hopes alive. With crucial seeding for bracket play on the line, both teams battle through intense rallies and strategic plays in this pool play matchup.
Video.title: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Kennesaw State vs. Virginia Tech

Image.alt: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Kennesaw State vs. Virginia Tech
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Kennesaw State vs. Virginia Tech
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Kennesaw State vs. Virginia Tech

Video.summary: Nathalie Bagby and Natalija Shaw take on Diane Wainio and Karin Kochis in this Women's Senior Pro Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Match

US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Match

Video.summary: David Weinbach and Altaf Merchant take on Dayne Gingrich and Mircea Morariu in this Men's Senior Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match - S01E26

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match - S01E26
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match - S01E26
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match - S01E26

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League returns for an explosive Season 2 at the iconic Jio World Garden in BKC, Mumbai. The season opener features a high-stakes rematch of last year's final: the defending champion Bengaluru Jawans, owned by cinematic powerhouse Atlee and Priya Atlee, take on the formidable Pune United, led by owner Riteish Deshmukh. Witness world-class athletes from 18 countries compete in a series of intense Men’s Singles, Women’s Doubles, and Mixed Doubles matches. With the pressure of a "Davis Cup" atmosphere and the precision of tactical "kitchen" play, both teams battle for every point to establish early dominance in India’s premier pickleball league.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Pune - Day 1 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Pune - Day 1 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Pune - Day 1 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Pune - Day 1 Tie 1

Video.summary: The atmosphere at Mumbai's Jio World Garden is electric as the host team, Mumbai Pickle Power, rides the momentum of their first season victory into a high-stakes clash against the Rajasthan Titans. With Rajasthan still hunting for their elusive first win of the season, the pressure is at a breaking point for both squads as they fight to climb the "Band of Honor" leaderboard. Witness tactical masterclasses as veteran Lorena Dupnik faces off against Jada Bui in a strategic battle of precision, and feel the intensity of the men's singles where superstars like Brandon Lane and Jack Foster showcase explosive athleticism. From game-changing "Pickle Plays" to high-stakes challenges and the presence of celebrity guests like Rishabh Pant, every rally in this tie is a desperate fight for survival on the road to the semifinals.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Rajasthan - Day 8 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Rajasthan - Day 8 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Rajasthan - Day 8 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Rajasthan - Day 8 Tie 1

Video.summary: The stakes reach their absolute peak at Mumbai’s Jio World Garden for the first semifinal of the World Pickleball League Season 2, where there are "no do overs" for the Chennai Super Champs and Pune United. Witness a high-stakes tactical chess match as Chennai’s coach Jonny Goldberg makes the bold move to start premier player Rika Fujiwara against the "big and aggressive" Katie Morris in a critical women's singles clash. The intensity continues with a masterclass in mixed doubles featuring the powerful pairing of Lee Hwang Nam and Carlota Trevino facing off against Pune's consistent stars, William Sobeck and Magdalena Gregorio. Every point is a desperate grind for survival as these two titans battle through "world class" rallies for a guaranteed spot in the grand finale.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Pune - Day 12 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Pune - Day 12 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Pune - Day 12 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Pune - Day 12 Tie 1

Video.summary: Witness a high-stakes showdown on the final day of league competition as the undefeated Chennai Super Champs face off against a determined Pune United squad in a battle for postseason momentum. The atmosphere at Mumbai’s Jio World Garden is electric, featuring a "lip-smacking" women's singles battle between European stars Katie Morris and Dominika Turkovic. As Pune fights to stay alive in the tie, coach Rusty Sobeck looks for a breakthrough in a tactical mixed doubles clash against Jonny Goldberg’s top-tier rotation. From "stunning singles fight backs" to a strategic masterclass in doubles positioning, this tie showcases the intense grit required to challenge the league's only unbeaten titan.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Chennai - Day 11 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Chennai - Day 11 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Chennai - Day 11 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Chennai - Day 11 Tie 1

Video.summary: The final two teams battle it out for the Orchard Championship Cup.

Image.alt: S01E06 - The Championship
S01E06 - The Championship
S01E06 - The Championship

Video.summary: This episode features courtside commentary on a ladies doubles match between the Sarasota Manatees and the GNV Chomp, followed by a men's doubles match between the same two teams. The ladies match showcases the absolute dominance of the top-seeded GNV Chomp, with players like Heather Nobler and Kelsey Laurent proving why they're a force to be reckoned with. The Sarasota Manatees, with new player Andy Godwin, fight to improve their league standing. The episode then transitions to a close men's doubles match featuring players Tobias Moreno and BK for the Chomp and Jamir and Jared Brooks for the Manatees.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 4 - GNV Chomp vs. Sarasota Manatees

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 4 - GNV Chomp vs. Sarasota Manatees
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 4 - GNV Chomp vs. Sarasota Manatees
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 4 - GNV Chomp vs. Sarasota Manatees
